title: Nicosia, Nicosia District — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nicosia, Nicosia District: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nicosia is a city in Nicosia District with a population of 200,452. Europe’s last divided capital, a city where ancient Venetian walls meet modern boulevards, with a rich history spanning Byzantine, Lusignan, and Ottoman eras.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
